testcase.name: Null value represents a deletion tombstone
New version starts with ACTIVE status and MAX_VALUE commit timestamp
isVisibleTo returns false for ABORTED version
isVisibleTo returns true for committed version with commitTs <= snapshotTs
Abort sets status to ABORTED, timestamp stays MAX_VALUE
isVisibleTo returns false for committed version with commitTs > snapshotTs
Version links to previous version in chain
isVisibleTo returns false for ACTIVE version
Non-null value is not a deletion
Commit sets timestamp and status atomically visible to readers
